---
title: "My Young Alcides: A Faded Photograph. 2 vols"
---

## My Young Alcides: A Faded Photograph. 2 vols

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1875
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Company.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
